claims.text: The proposed refactoring reduces cyclomatic complexity by an estimated 32%
The modified code handles null input in the service layer without runtime errors
No test coverage regressions are introduced by this change

evidence.title: Static Analysis Complexity Scores
evidence.excerpt: Before: 12 branches, After: 8 branches (4.2c reduction per SWC standard)

evidence.title: PaymentService.ts
evidence.excerpt: Service layer now implements InputValidator before processing. Null check added at line 147.

evidence.title: Test Coverage Report - Run 123456
evidence.excerpt: Coverage: Client 94% (prev: 94%), Integration 88% (prev: 87%), System 91% (prev: 91%). No drops.

reasoning_chain.description: Analyzed source code commit to identify refactoring patterns
Ran complexity analysis on modified branches
Cross-referenced with recent CI runs to confirm test results

known_unknowns: Detailed runtime performance metrics not captured in this analysis
Third-party library version compatibility not verified
assumptions: Static analysis complexity scores correlate with cyclomatic complexity estimate
Current CI infrastructure reflects production parity

contradictions.description: Reduced complexity (benefit) may correlate with increased test file count (visual), but statistical correlation is not established in this analysis

context.task_description: Refactor payment service layer to improve null safety and reduce complexity

tool_calls.input_summary: Analyzed src/services/payment.ts diff against base commit abcd1234
tool_calls.output_summary: Detected 3 complexity reductions, null-safe pattern adopted

tool_calls.input_summary: Extract function-level branch counts from modified unit paths
tool_calls.output_summary: Calculated branch reduction of 4.2 per SWC standard

tool_calls.input_summary: Ran full test suite for affected packages
tool_calls.output_summary: No coverage regressions detected; baseline 91-94% maintained
